iv infusion: in the phase 3, for patients randomized to the control arm who have worsened after 24hrs and within 14 days from randomization, reparixin will be offered as rescue medication also as a continuous i.v. infusion into a central vein or dedicated peripherally inserted central catheter at a dose of 2.772 mg/kg body weight/hour for up to 7 days (120hrs). for each 750 ml dosing solution volume, the content of a vial (250 ml) will be diluted with 500 ml of 0.9% sterile saline to dispense reparixin as 11.00 mg/ml solution.
